import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; function Home() { const [clientData, setClientData] = useState(null); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { try { const loggedInUser = localStorage.getItem('clientUser'); if (loggedInUser) { setClientData(JSON.parse(loggedInUser)); } } catch (error) { console.error("Error parsing user data:", error); } }, []); const handleCardAction = (type) => { if (type === 'payments') { alert("Redirecting to our Secure Payment Policy..."); } else if (type === 'students') { navigate('/services'); } else if (type === 'delivery') { navigate('/contact'); } }; return (
